title: Live A Little
subtitle: Naxos, Greece — May 2024
description: Jace on a perfectly placed rock in Naxos, suspended inside the stillness that later became his poem Live a Little.

source.worldModelPrompt: Wide Mediterranean shoreline memory in Naxos, Greece at golden hour. Preserve the original seated boy on the foreground rock in a bright blue hoodie as the clear focal human anchor. Reconstruct the surrounding granite rock field, shallow tide pool, ocean horizon, islands, and sky as a cohesive fully explorable 360 coastal world. Keep the seated boy readable and intact, preserve ground continuity around him, avoid floating fragments or detached blocks, and complete the unseen environment with believable rock formations, sand, tide pools, and Aegean light.

narrative.text: A boy sits on a perfectly placed rock in a perfectly placed world.
The sea keeps moving. He stays still long enough for the whole shore to sound like a thought.
Sometimes a life changes because someone finally decides to live a little.
